title: Ensure 'Self service password reset enabled' is set to 'All'
remediation:
1. Follow our step-by-step guidance to enable self-service password reset 
  2. If you have users that are synced from on-premises Active Directory using Microsoft Entra ID Connect, you may also need to enable the password writeback feature. For more information, see this article
remediationImpact: Users will be able to self-service password reset in Microsoft Entra ID and no longer need to engage help desk.
